creator: eric@madrid.lol
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)

I did: make install clean with OpenSSL installed
@ /usr/ports/databases/pecl-mongodb/
as before I get the error when I run:
service php-fpm restart
Starting php_fpm.
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
/usr/local/etc/rc.d/php-fpm: WARNING: failed to start php_fpm

I happen to have the browser open when I rebooted the server and hit refresh when the server was coming back up and the page came up, YAY!

Checked the mongodb
MongoDB support	enabled
MongoDB extension version	1.5.2
MongoDB extension stability	stable
libbson bundled version	        1.12.0
libmongoc bundled version	1.12.0
libmongoc SSL	                enabled
libmongoc SSL library	        OpenSSL
libmongoc crypto	        enabled
libmongoc crypto library	libcrypto
libmongoc crypto system profile	disabled
libmongoc SASL	                disabled
libmongoc ICU	                enabled
libmongoc compression	        enabled
libmongoc compression snappy	enabled
libmongoc compression zlib	enabled
Directive	Local Value	Master Value
mongodb.debug	no value	no value

Ran: service php-fpm restart
Again got the error failed to start php_fpm
Ran: service php-fpm status

php_fpm is running as pid 1078.

It seems to work? but I get the error every time.
stop
start 
or
restart

but it works and the page comes up???
Have not tried connection to my DB, but it should work.

Strange...
